finding_results.notes: Reworked the confrontation span so Tom cycles through distinct evasive bargaining tactics (fabricated housekeeping narrative, temporary ring pawn variants, staged-spousal-support ask) while Elsie counters with concrete figures, household constraints, and hearing-specific consequences. Dialogue now carries more interruptions and colloquial pressure texture with stronger idiolect separation and reduced slogan-like one-liners.

summary: The chapter now addresses the dialogue-cadence finding by separating Tom's evasive, familiarity-heavy bargaining voice from Elsie's practical, materially grounded resistance without changing core chapter continuity outcomes.
